metadata.name: Manage Port Preparations for a Coming Storm

description: A hurricane is forecast to approach the port. The emergency manager must coordinate preparations to secure the facility.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the storm's forecast track and intensity.

expected_outcome.value: Manager gets regular updates on the hurricane's expected arrival time and wind speed.

nodes.task_description: Instruct terminal operations to lower crane booms and add extra tie-downs to all cranes.

expected_outcome.value: Work orders are issued to secure all heavy equipment.

nodes.task_description: Order the evacuation of all vessels from their berths to safer anchorage offshore.

expected_outcome.value: The harbormaster communicates with all vessels and directs them to leave the port.
